terms:
Warranty & Service
• The entire project installation is covered by a 1-year warranty from the completion date.
• Warranty includes damages to the installed GEOTEXTILE system and related parts.
• If the GEOTEXTILE develops fungus, cracks, or other damage caused by external factors, the service cost must be borne by the client (party) and not by the company.
• Warranty does not cover misuse, poor maintenance, or external physical damage.

Project Duration & Scope
• The project will begin once the order is confirmed with the 50% advance payment.
• The complete project will be finished within 7 days from the date of confirmation.
• Project will start with the removal of the old GEOTEXTILE or old system.
• A new GEOTEXTILE system will be installed after applying a special bonding liquid to ensure proper adhesion and durability.

Payment Terms
• 50% advance payment to confirm and start the project.
• 50% payment after completion of installation work.
